name: Mediterranean Chicken-Pecan Salad
recipeIngredient: 5 Medium Tomatoes (About 1 Pound), Cut Into Thin Wedges
3 Chicken Breast Halves, Roasted or Grilled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the tomatoes, basil, olive oil, lemon juice, and garlic. Let marinate at room temperature for 20 minutes.
2. Add the cooked rice and cooked chicken strips to the bowl. Stir to combine.
3. Fold in half of the toasted pecans.
4. Spoon the salad into the center of serving plates and surround with the greens.
5. Scatter the remaining pecans over the top of the salad.
